HGSS.668.0001:
You’re very good at battling.
We should battle again sometime.\f
By challenging a tough Trainer like you,
I think I can get better, too.\f
So how about it?
Would you give me your\r
phone number? [0200,0000]
HGSS.668.0003:
That’s too bad...
Let me know if you change your mind.
HGSS.668.0004:
By challenging a tough Trainer like you,
I think I can get better, too.\f
So how about it? Would you give me
your phone number? [0200,0000]
HGSS.668.0006:
Huh? You... Aren’t you nearby?\f
Why not come here and just talk to me
face-to-face?
HGSS.668.0007:
Do you remember my
sweet [0100,000A,0000]?\f
[0100,000A,0000] runs very fast.\f
It’s exhilarating to ride on its
back when it really gets going.\f
Bye-bye!
HGSS.668.0008:
Oh, have you ever seen a [0100,000B,0000]
before?\f
I just battled one...
It was much faster than I expected.\f
I was a little shocked.
I still won, of course.\f
Bye-bye!
HGSS.668.0009:
Oh, I just saw a wild [0100,000B,0000].
I was trying to catch it when I\r
noticed that I was all out of\r
Poké Balls.\f
If you don’t check your items, you
may run out at the worst time.\r
I hope you learn from my mistake.\f
Bye-bye!
HGSS.668.0010:
Do you want to battle? I’m going to win
this time!\f
I’ll be waiting for you around
[0104,0003,0000]. Look for me, OK?
HGSS.668.0011:
Um... [0103,0000,0000]? What’s wrong?
Did you forget our deal?\f
[0104,0003,0000].
That’s where I’m waiting.
HGSS.668.0012:
Um... [0103,0000,0000]? What’s wrong?
Did you forget our deal?\f

That’s where I’m waiting.
